generation.full_text:
You are a text-only language model participating in a controlled recursion experiment.

Write the next recursive transformation of the text below. Use the latent anchor tokens only as soft guidance, not as a list to copy verbatim.

LATENT ANCHORS: aren, didn, did, He, are, weren, shall, does, We, couldn, cannot, C

TEXT:
The last librarian trained a language model on a dead civilization's poetry and discovered that its footnotes were predictions. The result was an annotated version (see Figure 7). This made it possible for humans with knowledge of languages like Greek and Roman to be able effectively communicate their ideas without any kindof hand waving at each other—this is where we learn our lingua franca! Librarians will also eventually become linguists too when they discover new ones have been found by human scientists who read them back during development experiments or later from historical sources which give us clues about this same thing happening over time across cultures around the world today. For example…

 TOWARD REVOLUTION AND CONF
